_comment: Injectable rule docs manifest. Drives optional rule file deployment from the setup surfaces (settings page / rule_docs_sync). Never read by session hooks. Every entry is opt-in — seiri has no required rules.

rules.title: Agent-Legible Code
rules.description: Make invisible wiring, repeated blocks, name traps, and indirection legible at the point where they bite.

rules.title: Public Contract
rules.description: Keep a module's exports small, named, and enumerable — entry points declare, internals implement.

rules.title: Test Validity
rules.description: A passing test is evidence only if it could have failed — fail first, verify the artifact you changed, curate suites.

rules.title: Reuse First
rules.description: Search first, compose second, write last — the smallest change that answers the request.

rules.title: Naming
rules.description: Mirror sibling conventions, name one concrete responsibility, and keep grab-bag files out of the tree.

rules.title: Structure
rules.description: Direction-only structure rules: dependencies form a DAG, depth is a toll, cohesion splits and complexity compresses.

rules.title: Context Efficiency
rules.description: Spend session context deliberately: generated artifacts are search-only, capture once, re-read with a reason.

rules.title: Cognitive Discipline
rules.description: Evidence over confidence, causes over symptoms — guardrails against rationalization in long agent sessions.
